remember: Students will be able to recall types of intellectual property rights.
Students will be able to identify the importance of intellectual property rights.
Students will be able to list the benefits of intellectual property rights.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of intellectual property rights.
Students will be able to explain the need for intellectual property rights.
Students will be able to describe the types of intellectual property rights and their protection.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concept of intellectual property rights in real-world scenarios.
Students will be able to use intellectual property rights to protect their own work.
Students will be able to identify and explain the consequences of violating intellectual property rights.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of intellectual property rights on society.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of current intellectual property rights laws.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different types of intellectual property rights.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of intellectual property rights and their importance in the digital age.
Describe the different types of intellectual property rights and their protection.
Discuss the benefits and consequences of intellectual property rights.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the concept of intellectual property rights and its importance.
Describe the different types of intellectual property rights.
Discuss the consequences of violating intellectual property rights.
